turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I did some blood tests at your clinic last Friday. Uh, I haven't received the reports yet. Can you check what's happening?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Could I get your name and the date the samples were collected?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Suresh Iyer. It was last Friday, the 30th. I did a full CBC and lipid profile.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Mr. Iyer. I want to help, but unfortunately I'm not able to access or track lab report statuses through this line — that requires our laboratory team directly. Let me connect you to our staff who can pull this up for you right away.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course, please hold while I transfer your call. Thank you for your patience.
